topic: Every laundromat I use returns clothes that are not mine and they are always children's clothes
title: Every Laundromat I Use Returns Children's Clothes That Are Not Mine | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every laundromat I use returns clothes that are not mine. They are always children's clothes.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a fluorescent lit laundromat at night, rows of front loading dryers, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Sun Star Laundromat. Eighty third and Allen. Two blocks from my apartment.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small neighborhood laundromat at dusk, a SUN STAR sign glowing in the window, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tuesday nights. Twenty quarters. Same machine.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand placing quarters into a coin slot on a commercial dryer, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First time was March. Pulled out my dryer. A child's dress folded on top.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open dryer drum with a small child's dress visible neatly folded on top of adult clothes, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked the attendant. He said nobody had been there.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a laundromat attendant at a counter seen from behind, the door behind them, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next Tuesday. Different machine. A pair of small white socks. Folded.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a pair of small white children's socks folded on top of adult laundry inside a dryer drum, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tried a different laundromat. Same thing.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a different laundromat at night, identical dryer rows, fluorescent overhead, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: All four laundromats in my zip code return children's clothes in my dryer cycle.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of four different laundromat receipts laid out on a kitchen counter, the names of the shops visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Started walking away without folding. The clothes are still folded when I return.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person walking away from a running dryer in a laundromat, only their back visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I found a child's t shirt with my name on the tag. My handwriting.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a small white t shirt with a handwritten name on the tag, the handwriting clearly visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have never had children. I have never owned a child's t shirt.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding the small t shirt against a kitchen counter, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My laundry has stopped coming home with my clothes.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a laundry basket on a wooden floor with only adult clothes folded, no small clothes visible in the basket, vertical 9:16 framing
